privileged_info_summary: The task is generative and synthetic, requiring the agent to design a molten salt power tower via PySAM. Independent execution using SAM PySAM SDK with TMY3 data from Daggett and Tucson perfectly bounds the physical output plausibility: Annual energy runs ~550 GWh (bounds 200-800), Capacity Factor ~70% (bounds 30-75), and LCOE ~8.5 cents/kWh (bounds 4-30). All expected output file paths and input parameters match explicitly.
